items.name: 船形神社「木造十二神将立像」
items.location: 小栗山地区・船形神社
items.description: 船形神社の社殿に安置されていた十二体の木造十二神将。

en.name_en: Funagata Shrine "Wooden Standing Statues of the Twelve Divine Generals"
en.description_en: A tangible cultural property in the category of sculpture. Town-designated by Shikama Town on 2012-12-03. Located at Funagata Shrine, Oguriyama district.
